problem id: 59c78e51
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND SHR(4)) XOR SHL(4)

examples:
  10100001 -> 00010000
  01100001 -> 00010100
  11011110 -> 11101001
  11111011 -> 10111111
  10011111 -> 11110001
  01001001 -> 10010000
  11011011 -> 10111001
  11011111 -> 11111001

query: 10010000
predicted answer: 00000000
